issue_summary: Rename "Graph" to "BasicGraph". Flip the inheritance hierarchy. Now, BasicGraph<N> extends ValueGraph<N, Presence>.
javadoc_before:

 */
javadoc_after:

 * Static utility methods for {@link ValueGraph} and {@link Network} instances.

 * @since 20.0
 */
